Lapidacao.title: Lapidação: The Ultimate Hair Schedule
Lapidacao.description: A 4-step journey that transforms the health of your hair. From deep cleansing to absolute sealing, each stage was designed with nanoprocessed technology for immediate results.

step1.title: 1. Cleanse
step1.description: Removal of impurities without damaging the hair fiber.

step2.title: 2. Seal
step2.description: Cuticle preparation to receive the treatment.

step3.title: 3. Reconstruct
step3.description: Replacement of lost mass and keratin.

Hero.title:
A Story Built on
Quality, Science and Purpose
Hero.subtitle: From our in-house factory in Amparo, Sao Paulo, to salons, distributors and end customers across Brazil, Diamante Profissional grows with high performance, fair pricing and professional standards.

Manifesto.title: Who We Are
Manifesto.paragraph1: Diamante Profissional was founded in 2010 in Amparo, in the countryside of Sao Paulo, by Mario Juliano Scavroni with the purpose of producing and marketing quality cosmetics at a fair price. Today, the brand offers more than 200 products for hair care, including professional and home care lines, as well as fine fragrances, makeup and body hydration.
Manifesto.paragraph2: We are market leaders in the state of Sao Paulo and continue expanding across Brazil through partner salons that trust our performance. This journey has also taken Diamante abroad, with exports to France, Morocco, Turkey and Sweden.
Manifesto.paragraph3: Every product line manufactured and sold by Diamante Profissional is authorized and regulated by ANVISA, reinforcing our commitment to safety, legality and original quality in every item.
Manifesto.paragraph4: In addition to our own brand, we also work with private label manufacturing and product development for salons and distributors, supporting professionals and entrepreneurs who want to create a line with their own identity and reliable structure.

Laboratory.title: In-House Factory, Model Store and Nationwide Operation
Laboratory.description: Diamante Profissional's headquarters, factory and model store are all located in Amparo, Sao Paulo. This in-house structure gives us stronger control over production, quality standards and logistics while serving customers throughout Brazil.

quality.title: Real Quality
quality.desc: In-house manufacturing, selected ingredients and product development focused on real results in salons and at home.

compliance.title: Safety and Compliance
compliance.desc: The entire line is authorized and regulated by ANVISA, ensuring authenticity, traceability and trust.

partnership.desc: We support salons, distributors and entrepreneurs with private label and contract manufacturing solutions.

Process.title: From Project to Delivery of Your Brand
Process.description: Each stage is designed to turn your idea into a product line ready for commercialization, with more clarity, agility and technical support.

1.title: You send your project
1.desc: We receive your idea, goals and product category to understand the best development path.

2.title: You receive the quote
2.desc: We present the commercial proposal with technical direction, scope and next steps.

3.title: You approve the sample
3.desc: We develop the sample for validation before moving into production.

4.title: We start production
4.desc: After approval, we structure manufacturing, filling and technical follow-up according to the defined project.

5.title: Your line is delivered
5.desc: Your finished product is delivered ready for sale, with support through the delivery stage.

1.title: Diagnosis & Choice
1.desc: Definition of the product mix and formula testing in our laboratory.

2.title: Design & Label
2.desc: Our team helps customize the packaging with your brand identity.

3.title: Production & ANVISA
3.desc: Large-scale manufacturing following strict quality standards and registrations.

4.title: Ready for Sale
4.desc: You receive the finished products, ready to delight your customers.

Payment.title: Payment Methods
Payment.content:
We accept major credit card brands: MASTERCARD – VISA – ELO – CABAL – HIPERCARD – HIPER – ALELO – SODEXO – TICKET – VRBENEFÍCIOS – AMERICAN EXPRESS – DINERS CLUB.
The maximum installment plan offered by the website is up to 6x (3x interest-free, 4-5-6 installments with interest) or in a single payment.
Minimum value per installment is R$ 10.00. For your security, all payment processing is done via a transparent gateway within our website.
The release for assembling and shipping your order will only happen after payment approval. We reserve the right to only ship the merchandise after approval.

Returns.title: Returns & Exchanges
Returns.content:
To perform exchanges due to defects, we follow the guidelines of Art. 26 of the Consumer Defense Code. The right to complain expires in: 30 days for non-durable products and 90 days for durable ones.
The period starts from the receipt of the product. If you wish to exchange due to a defect, please get in touch through our Contact page. The resolution period is up to 30 days.
If the defect is confirmed, the customer can choose to exchange for an identical product (subject to availability), a shopping voucher, or a money refund.

Shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
Shipping.content:
We offer free shipping on purchases above R$199.00 for the South and Southeast regions of Brazil, and above R$299.00 for the Midwest, North and Northeast.

We ship throughout Brazil via Correios and transport partners. At checkout, the customer selects the delivery option available for the informed ZIP code. We work with Correios, Jadlog, Braspress, Jamef and TNT to ensure reach, speed and safety.

If a Correios shipment is delayed, our team opens a support protocol and follows up the occurrence directly with the carrier. In cases of confirmed loss, theft or non-location, we arrange a replacement shipment at no additional cost.

For carrier deliveries, we also provide active support in situations involving delays, address issues or tracking questions. Correct delivery information is the customer's responsibility at the time of purchase.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.content:
Diamante Profissional respects user privacy and collects only the information required to provide its services safely and transparently.

Data submitted through forms, purchases and contact channels is used for customer service, order processing, communication and website experience improvement. Information is stored with commercially reasonable safeguards against unauthorized access, alteration, copying or disclosure.

We do not publicly share personal information with third parties, except when required to operate the service or by law. Our website may contain links to external pages, and we are not responsible for the privacy practices of those environments.

By continuing to browse and use the website, the user agrees with these practices. If there are any questions about the handling of personal data, contact can be made directly with the Diamante Profissional team.
